html:
Exclusive to:

Moqueca is a Warly-specific Food item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires at least 0.25 Fishes, a Toma Root and an Onion to cook. Fillers cannot be Inedibles.

When eaten, it gives 112.5 , 60 and 30. Its high hunger is very efficient at filling up Warly's belly, especially for his food penalty.

Recipe

×0.25

Filler cannot be Inedibles.

Examples

Trivia

  • Moqueca was added to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.
  • Moqueca is a Brazilian food with its origins in the mix of Portuguese, African, and Native ingredients. It is made with tropical, accessible, and sea foods like fishes, clams, crustaceans, chicken, and eggs. This dish is still consumed in Angola, Pará, Espírito Santo, and Bahia.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Moqueca là một Thực phẩm đặc trưng của Warly được nấu trong Nồi Hầm Di Động, độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together. Cần ít nhất 0,25 con cá, một củ cà chua và một củ hành để nấu. Chất độn không thể là chất không ăn được.

'''Moqueca''' is a [[Warly]]-specific [[Food]] [[item]] cooked in the [[Portable Crock Pot]], exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It requires at least 0.25 [[Fishes]], a [[Toma Root]] and an [[Onion]] to cook. Fillers cannot be [[Inedibles]].

When eaten, it gives 112.5 {{Hunger}}, 60 {{Hp}} and 30{{Sanity}}. Its high hunger is very efficient at filling up [[Warly]]'s belly, especially for his food penalty.

== {{Pic32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Fishes
|count1 = 0.25
|item2 = Onions
|item3 = Toma Roots
|item4 = Filler
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Moqueca
|note = Filler cannot be [[Inedibles]].
}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Freshwater Fish
|item2 = Onions
|item3 = Toma Roots
|item4 = Ice
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Moqueca
}}
{{Recipe

|item2 = Onions
|item3 = Toma Roots
|item4 = Honey
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Moqueca
}}
{{clear}}

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Moqueca was added to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#July 25, 2019 - Warly Character Update|Warly Character Update]].
* Moqueca is a Brazilian food with its origins in the mix of Portuguese, African, and Native ingredients. It is made with tropical, accessible, and sea foods like fishes, clams, crustaceans, chicken, and eggs. This dish is still consumed in Angola, Pará, Espírito Santo, and Bahia.
{{clear}}
